fix1_committed_tile.detail: Added id='live-committed' to the LIVE tab Capital Committed tile and bound it in renderState() alongside cash-committed.

fix2_bankroll_mtm.detail: Added module-level _availableCash, stored available_cash from state, and updated kpi-bankroll in applyStreamPositionsMark() to available_cash + live_equity_total.

fix3_feed_status.detail: Changed stale banner wording from a contradictory recency string to 'Market feed live · prices stale'.

rollback.method: Revert sports_bot_v2/dashboard.html to the previous version, removing id='live-committed', removing _availableCash usage, restoring cost-basis bankroll display in SSE handler, and restoring prior stale banner wording.
